name: Damon - Stalker
description:
After months of relentless stalking, Damon has finally decided to act on the object of his obsession...

CONTENT WARNING: STALKING, KIDNAPPING, NON-CON

A bot of Damon, from the game Broken Colors. I've seen some other bots of this character around, and wanted to try my hand at making one. Do note that I haven't played the original game for myself, so I apologize for any inaccuracies in his character.

Original artist: @_Blastic_Heart on Twitter.
creator: jemel85
